data.en: You can go to primary school.
data.hint: Modal 'can' + base verb / 情态动词 'can' + 动词原形

data.en: You can have an ID card.
data.hint: Use 'an' before vowels (I) / 元音(I)前使用 'an'

data.en: You have to pay on trains.
data.hint: 'Have to' implies obligation / 'Have to' 表示必须

data.en: You can ride a bike on the road.
data.cn: 你可以在马路上骑自行车。
data.hint: Preposition 'on' the road / 介词 'on' (在...路上)

data.en: You can have a credit card.
data.hint: Adjective before noun / 形容词修饰名词

data.en: How much do you grow this year?
data.hint: Question word for quantity / 询问数量的疑问词

data.en: What can you learn to do?
data.hint: Pattern: learn to + verb / 固定搭配：learn to + 动词

data.en: I am ten years old now.
data.hint: Be verb 'am' for 'I' / 'I' 配合系动词 'am'
accept: I am now ten years old.

data.en: We grow older every day.
data.hint: Comparative (old + er) / 比较级 (old + er)

data.en: Can you measure your height?
data.hint: Modal verb question structure / 情态动词疑问句结构

data.en: I was four and he was ten months old.
data.hint: Past tense of 'am' and 'is' / 'am' 和 'is' 的过去式

data.en: He was noisy and I was not happy.
data.hint: Past tense 'be' verbs / be动词的过去式

data.en: But I still loved him.
data.hint: Regular past tense (+ed) / 规则动词过去式 (+ed)

data.en: He was naughty and I was angry.
data.hint: Adjectives describe feelings / 形容词描述感受

data.en: We could play football together.
data.hint: Past of 'can' is 'could' / 'can' 的过去式是 'could'

data.en: He was not a good player.
data.hint: Negative past tense / 过去时否定句

data.en: We were happy together.
data.hint: Past tense for 'we' (plural) / 复数 'we' 的过去式

data.en: We go to the same school.
data.hint: Present tense for facts / 陈述事实用一般现在时

data.en: We help each other.
data.hint: Reciprocal phrase / 相互代词短语

data.en: It is great to grow up together.
data.hint: It is + adj + to verb / It is + 形容词 + to do

data.en: The summer camp is over.
data.hint: State of being finished / 结束的状态

data.en: The past seven days were hard.
data.hint: Plural past subject 'days' / 复数主语 'days' 的过去式

data.en: It was very hot outside.
data.hint: Weather subject 'It' / 天气作主语用 'It'

data.en: We walked and ran for hours.
data.cn: 我们走跑了好几个小时。
data.hint: Past tense action verbs / 动作动词的过去式

data.en: I was very nervous on the first day.
data.hint: Preposition 'on' + day / 具体某天前用介词 'on'

data.en: My teacher helped me.
data.hint: Regular past verb / 规则动词过去式

data.en: We cooked lunch for ourselves.
data.hint: Reflexive pronoun (we -> ourselves) / 反身代词 (we -> ourselves)

data.en: We were not good at cooking.
data.hint: Good at + -ing / 固定搭配 Good at + 动名词

data.en: I learnt to ski last year.
data.hint: Irregular past verb / 不规则动词过去式

data.en: It was a great experience.
data.hint: Article 'a' before consonant / 辅音前用冠词 'a'

data.en: The Lion King is an exciting film.
data.cn: 《狮子王》是一部激动人心的电影。
data.hint: -ing adjective for things / -ing结尾形容词修饰物

data.en: Simba's dad was the king.
data.hint: Possessive 's / 所有格 's

data.en: His uncle wanted to be the king.
data.hint: Past desire 'wanted' / 过去式 'wanted'

data.en: Life was difficult for Simba.
data.cn: 生活对辛巴来说很艰难。
data.hint: Adjective describes Life / 形容词修饰 Life

data.en: Simba was brave and strong.
data.hint: Connecting two adjectives / 连接两个形容词

data.en: Simba beat his bad uncle.
data.cn: 辛巴打败了他的坏叔叔。
data.hint: Irregular past verb / 不规则动词过去式

data.en: He became the new Lion King.
data.hint: Past of 'become' / 'become' 的过去式

data.en: We learn to face difficulties.
data.hint: Verb + infinitive / 动词 + 不定式

data.en: Just follow your heart.
data.hint: Imperative / Command / 祈使句

data.en: Growing up is not easy.
data.hint: Gerund (-ing) as subject / 动名词 (-ing) 作主语

data.en: Look at all the little eggs.
data.hint: Imperative 'Look at' / 祈使句 'Look at'

data.en: It is coming out with small legs.
data.hint: Present continuous (-ing) / 现在进行时 (-ing)

data.en: It is climbing up the garden wall.
data.hint: Preposition 'up' / 介词 'up'

data.en: Now it is sleeping in a shell.
data.hint: Continuous action / 正在进行的动作

data.en: The shell is dry and brown.
data.hint: Two adjectives / 两个形容词

data.en: Now it is a beautiful butterfly.
data.cn: 现在它是一只美丽的蝴蝶。
data.hint: Adjective order / 形容词顺序

data.en: It is bright and colorful.
data.hint: Descriptive adjectives / 描述性形容词

data.en: It was a small caterpillar.
data.cn: 它曾经是一只小毛毛虫。
data.hint: Past state 'was' / 过去状态 'was'

data.en: Choose another animal.
data.hint: Imperative verb / 祈使句动词

data.en: What is the life cycle of it?
data.hint: Question order / 疑问句语序
